title: Oru Thuli Mazhaiyinal Lyrics Eetti Song Lyrics
stanzas:
Eetti Oru Thuli Mazhaiyinal Song Lyrics
Singer: Sidharth Mahadevan
Lyrics: Annamalai

Oru thuli mazhaiyinal
Thodangudhu perungadal dhan
Un mudhal adiyai
Nee vaithida daa
Thadai thadai thadai thadai
Irupadhai thaandidadhaan
Nee kaatrinilae
Paayum eetiya daa
Kadigaaram mullai pole
Nirkaamal nee odu
Kaal theendum dhooram dhane
Vetri kodu

Oru thuli mazhaiyinal
Thodangudhu perungadal dhan
Un mudhal adiyai
Nee vaithida daa

Kuri vachu adi
Vetri varum padi
Muthirayai padhi
Nee oyaadhey
Mannai keezhe udhai
Mela varum varai
Boomikulley adhu dhinam poraadum
Puzhithidum viral
Un valithidum udal
Vaangum thanga medal
Nee kalangaadhey
Unakoru yellai
Ulagathil illai
kadavullin pillai
Ingu nee dhaaney
Paadham patta idam yaavum
Paadhai endrey maatrida odu

Thadukki nee vizhu
Thirumba nee yezhu
Adhil ondrum pizhai ingu kidayaadhu
Oru sira pirai
Therikindra varai
Nilavuku kurai adhu kidayaadhu
Pasikonda puli
Maanaivaikum kuri
Vettayaadum podhu irai thappadhu
Aagayathai thira
Nee adhai thaandi para
Vaanavillum maalai adhu unakaaga
Paadham patta idam yaavum
Paadhai endrey maatrida odu

Oru thuli mazhaiyinal
Thodangudhu perungadal dhan
Un mudhal adiyai
Nee vaithida daa
Thadai thadai thadai thadai
Irupadhai thaandidadhaan
Nee kaatrinilae
Paayum eetiya daa
Kadigaaram mullai pole
Nirkaamal nee odu
Kaal theendum dhooram dhane
Vetri kodu

Oru thuli mazhaiyinal
Thodangudhu perungadal dhan
Un mudhal adiyai
Nee vaithida daa

enrichedMetadata.faq:
Frequently Asked Questions

What is the meaning of the song?

The song conveys themes of love and longing, beautifully expressed through its lyrics.

What is the context of this song in the movie?

In Eetti, this song reflects the emotional connection between the lead characters, enhancing the romantic narrative.

Who is the singer of this song?

The song is sung by Sidharth Mahadevan, known for his expressive vocal style.

Who composed the music for this song?

The music is composed by GV PrakashKumar, a prominent figure in Tamil cinema music.

When was this song released?

This song was released on September 26, 2015.
enrichedMetadata.summary: In Oru Thuli Mazhaiyinal, the melody beautifully encapsulates the tender emotions of love and longing. Set against the backdrop of Eetti, the song serves as a poignant reminder of the deep connections between the characters. The soothing composition by GV PrakashKumar, paired with Annamalai's heartfelt lyrics, evokes a sense of nostalgia and warmth. This track is perfect for romantic occasions, making it a timeless addition to any playlist.
enrichedMetadata.high_ctr_intro: Oru Thuli Mazhaiyinal from Eetti is a mesmerizing melody that captures the essence of romance and nostalgia. With Sidharth Mahadevan's soulful voice and GV PrakashKumar's enchanting composition, this song is sure to tug at your heartstrings. Dive into the lyrical beauty crafted by Annamalai and experience a musical journey like no other.
stanzaMeanings: With a gentle rain, it begins, just like a big storm. You hold my first devotion. Keep going, keep going, keep going. You are the one who brings the breeze. Like a fragrant flower, you stand still. You run far away, bringing victory.
With a gentle rain, it begins, just like a big storm. You hold my first devotion.

With a target in mind, victory will come. Don't let anything go wrong. The earth will be beneath you until it comes. In this world, it will fight every day. Your fingers will bloom, and your body will shine. Don't lose your way. There is no one like you in this world. Wherever you go, the path will change.

Get up after falling down. Get back up again. There is no mistake here. Until the crescent moon appears, there is no shortage for the moon. The hungry tiger aims for the deer, and it won't miss. You must cross the sky. The garland in the heavens is for you. Wherever you go, the path will change.

With a gentle rain, it begins, just like a big storm. You hold my first devotion. Keep going, keep going, keep going. You are the one who brings the breeze. Like a fragrant flower, you stand still. You run far away, bringing victory.
With a gentle rain, it begins, just like a big storm. You hold my first devotion.
